acceptanceCriteria.AC1: PASS - Full demo flow works: Upload → Extract → Edit → Save → Publish → Render → Submit → Confirmation
acceptanceCriteria.AC2: PASS - Sample PDFs in backend/test-fixtures/ (business-registration.pdf, housing-benefit-application.pdf, universal-credit-change.pdf); documented in README
acceptanceCriteria.AC3: PASS - Error states handled gracefully across all pages; no unhandled promise rejections
acceptanceCriteria.AC4: PASS - GovLayout wraps all pages providing consistent header, phase banner, footer, and typography
acceptanceCriteria.AC5: PASS - Navigation links present: Dashboard → Upload, Dashboard → Editor, Editor → Renderer, all pages have back links
acceptanceCriteria.AC6: PASS - Upload failure, save failure, publish failure, schema fetch failure all show GOV.UK error messages
acceptanceCriteria.AC7: PASS - All inputs have associated labels; keyboard navigation verified in FormRendererPage; focus management on error summary
acceptanceCriteria.AC8: PASS - document.title set on all routes: Dashboard, Upload, Editor, FormRenderer (dynamic with form title)
acceptanceCriteria.AC9: PASS - h1 for page title, h2 for section headings on all pages
acceptanceCriteria.AC10: PASS - README.md created with prerequisites, installation, demo walkthrough, project structure, known limitations
